case_title: MICHAEL DROSIHN ET AL VS. PATRICK BOUSHELL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 250.00 - SERVED JAN-10-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOUSHELL, PATRICK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MICAHEL DROSIHN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF KELLY DROSIHN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICK BOUSHELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DROSIHN, MICHAEL DROSIHN, KELLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUSHELL, PATRICK $4,070.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,195.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $93.00 AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,682.00 FILED BY DROSIHN, MICHAEL DROSIHN, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT BOUSHELL, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 2/27/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DROSIHN, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2017 - JUDGMENT.
